prestazioni: Full bolt-on S63T4 (4.4L V8 twin-turbo) Stage 2+ ECU/TCU flash via MHD OTS 'CS Competition' map with 720 HP / 680 lb-ft on 93 octane, retaining OEM turbochargers but upgrading to custom 3.5" V-band downpipes (Fabspeed Motorsport) with 200-cell catalytic converters for minimal backpressure and +40 HP over stock catted units

OEM-spec S63T4 crankshaft reinforcement via VAC Motorsports billet main caps and ARP Custom Age 625+ head studs, paired with Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 CR) and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods for sustained 8,000 RPM reliability under 1.5 bar boost

Full cooling system overhaul: CSF Racing aluminum radiator (direct-fit F90 M5 CS), GPlus Motorsport 10-row oil cooler with integrated thermostat, and a custom 12L Motul 300V 15W-50 oil sump baffle kit to prevent oil starvation during 1.2G lateral loads
estetica: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion via 3D Design Japan's 'F90 M5 CS Competition' kit (front fenders + rear quarter panels), retaining OEM carbon roof and adding a custom 3M Matte Graphite vinyl overlay with satin clear coat for UV protection

OEM-spec M Performance carbon fiber front splitter with integrated Gurney flap (3M VHB tape installation) and a custom 3D-printed ABS rear diffuser (designed in-house via CAD) with integrated LED brake cooling ducts and carbon fiber side skirts (Vorsteiner)

Full interior carbon fiber trim replacement: Status Gruppe carbon fiber M5 CS-specific door cards, center console, and dashboard trim (retaining OEM Alcantara headliner), paired with a custom MCS Motorsport roll cage (half-cage, bolt-in) with Alcantara-wrapped crossbars and integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360)
